title: Life is a cabaret in Great Brak
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The annual Great Brak...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The annual Great Brak Cabaret takes place at De Dekke restaurant in Great Brak, outside Mossel Bay, on 30 and 31 May.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The annual Great Brak Cabaret takes place at De Dekke restaurant in Great Brak, outside Mossel Bay, on 30 and 31 May."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It is the highlight of the Great Brak calendar and many members of the community play a role in making it a success each year.","html":"It is the highlight of the Great Brak calendar and many members of the community play a role in making it a success each year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Welfare services","html":"Welfare services"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This exciting event raises funds for two important welfare services in the area: CAWS 4 PAWS and Child Welfare South Africa in Great Brak.","html":"This exciting event raises funds for two important welfare services in the area: CAWS 4 PAWS and Child Welfare South Africa in Great Brak."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Young and old are welcome and there are attractive prizes to be won for the best dressed, so get your glad rags on and be prepared for a fun-filled evening.","html":"Young and old are welcome and there are attractive prizes to be won for the best dressed, so get your glad rags on and be prepared for a fun-filled evening."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This is the one event on the Great Brak Social Calendar you do not want to miss. This year the theme is Vaudeville, so anything goes.","html":"This is the one event on the Great Brak Social Calendar you do not want to miss. This year the theme is Vaudeville, so anything goes."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Don't delay","html":"Don't delay"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Last year's opening night sold out in a flash so don't delay. Get your tickets today at https://qkt.io/cabaret2024.","html":"Last year's opening night sold out in a flash so don't delay. Get your tickets today at https://qkt.io/cabaret2024."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This time round you can choose your seats when you book, so be sure to buy enough tickets for all the friends and family you want seated at your table.","html":"This time round you can choose your seats when you book, so be sure to buy enough tickets for all the friends and family you want seated at your table."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"There are various table sizes, so if you prefer not to sit with another group be sure to book an entire table.","html":"There are various table sizes, so if you prefer not to sit with another group be sure to book an entire table."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Latest information","html":"Latest information"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"To stay up to date with all the latest information about the show, including performers, \"like\" cabaret Facebook page: www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100090615387159.","html":"To stay up to date with all the latest information about the show, including performers, \"like\" cabaret Facebook page: www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100090615387159."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The organisers look forward to seeing you there.","html":"The organisers look forward to seeing you there."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Line-up","html":"Line-up"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The line-up this year: Danny Boy & Libbie, Arty, Robert Smallz, Lirian Alencar, Karin Cupido, Zanah Erasmus, Petronel Baard, Frans Brits, Stef Kruger, Blackie Swart, Stretch, Siyakhona Youth Development Gumboot dancers, The Ruby Girls, Lettie Swanepoel and Marius du Bruyn.","html":"The line-up this year: Danny Boy & Libbie, Arty, Robert Smallz, Lirian Alencar, Karin Cupido, Zanah Erasmus, Petronel Baard, Frans Brits, Stef Kruger, Blackie Swart, Stretch, Siyakhona Youth Development Gumboot dancers, The Ruby Girls, Lettie Swanepoel and Marius du Bruyn."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The restaurant doors will open at 17: and the event starts at 19:00.","html":"The restaurant doors will open at 17: and the event starts at 19:00."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more information, WhatsApp 072 8199 746 or email [email protected].De Dekke restaurant will have dinner specials. More information will be shared with ticket holders nearer the time.","html":"For more information, WhatsApp 072 8199 746 or email [email protected].
De Dekke restaurant will have dinner specials. More information will be shared with ticket holders nearer the time."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
